title: Email Automation Window Size
excerpt: It would be helpful if we could expand the size of this box, so we didn’t have to do a lot of scrolling when setting up an email. It’s also difficult when writing an email and the top half says pulse text 8 and you’re no…

posts.author: SarahS (Sarah Stubblefield)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be helpful if we could expand the size of this box, so we didn’t have to do a lot of scrolling when setting up an email. It’s also difficult when writing an email and the top half says pulse text 8 and you’re not sure what that refers to when you go in to make edits. It would be ideal if the window could expand AND it would show the names instead of pulse names.

image1225×825 46.9 KB

posts.author: oliviaf (Olivia F)
posts.cookedHtml: When you type in the text for an email template to be sent via automations, the editor window is too small. If you are sending an email of any normal length, you have to do a lot of scrolling to proofread it. Please could you make the size adjustable, e.g. by dragging the corner of the pop-up outwards to expand the size of it on the screen.
